mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('SQ_REQUEST_KEY')
INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_SVC_CHG ( REQUEST_KEY, CSTMR_TYPE_CD, MANAGER_CD, AGENT_CD, CHG_MOBILE_NO, SVC_CNTR_NO, CUST_ID, REQ_USIM_SN, CNTPNT_SHOP_CD, MEMO, REG_DATE, REG_DT, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, PROC_CD, REC_YN, APP_FORM_YN, APP_FORM_XML_YN ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{cstmrType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{managerCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agentCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ctn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ncn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{custId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reqUsimSn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cntpntShopId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '데이터쉐어링 신청', TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), NOW(), NOW(), #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'RQ', 'N', 'N', 'N' )

INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_OSST ( REQUEST_KEY, MVNO_ORD_NO, SVC_CNTR_NO, CUST_ID, PRGR_STAT_CD, CRET_DT, AMD_DT ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{mvnoOrdNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{svcCntrNo}, #{custId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prgrStatCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey, MVNO_ORD_NO AS mvnoOrdNo, SVC_CNTR_NO AS svcCntrNo, CUST_ID AS custId, PRGR_STAT_CD AS prgrStatCd, RSLT_CD AS rsltCd, RSLT_MSG AS rsltMsg, OSST_ORD_NO AS osstOrdNo, TLPH_NO AS tlphNo, TLPH_NO_STAT_CD AS tlphNoStatCd, ENCD_TLPH_NO AS encdTlphNo, TLPH_NO_OWN_CMPN_CD AS tlphNoOwnCmpnCd, ASGN_AGNC_ID AS asgnAgncId, OPEN_SVC_IND_CD AS openSvcIndCd FROM MSF_REQUEST_OSST WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

SELECT REQUEST_KEY AS "requestKey", SVC_CNTR_NO AS "ncn", CHG_MOBILE_NO AS "ctn", CUST_ID AS "custId", AGENT_CD AS "agentCode", REQ_USIM_SN AS "reqUsimSn" FROM MSF_REQUEST_SVC_CHG WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
